exampleSentences: Anh có thể giúp em dựng cái lều này trong vườn không?
Chị muốn dựng bàn ghế trước nhà để tổ chức tiệc nhỏ.
Mỗi sáng, ba thường dựng xe đạp trước cửa cho em.

content.sentence: Chúng tôi sẽ ___ một ngôi nhà mới.

translation.en: We will build a new house.

notes:
dựng = to set up, put up, or build something so it stands upright. Think physical things: tents, houses, stages, poles.

It’s used for making something vertical or ready to use, often by assembling parts. Also common for media: dựng phim = to edit/produce a film (put the footage together). Another everyday meaning: dựng chuyện = to make up a story (often negative, like inventing drama).

Close to lắp (assemble) or xây (build), but dựng focuses more on raising or putting something upright.
notes_md:
**dựng** = to set up, put up, or build something so it stands upright. Think physical things: tents, houses, stages, poles.

It’s used for making something vertical or ready to use, often by assembling parts. Also common for media: **dựng phim** = to edit/produce a film (put the footage together). Another everyday meaning: **dựng chuyện** = to make up a story (often negative, like inventing drama).

Close to **lắp** (assemble) or **xây** (build), but *dựng* focuses more on raising or putting something upright.

content.sentence: Chúng tôi sẽ ___ một ngôi nhà mới.

translation.en: We will build a new house.

example.vi: Tôi sẽ dựng một ngôi nhà mới.
example.en: I will build a new house.
example.es: Voy a construir una casa nueva.

definitions.vi: xây dựng hoặc dựng lên một cái gì đó.

exampleSentencesTranslated: Can you help me set up this tent in the garden?
I want to set up tables and chairs in front of the house for a small party.
Every morning, Dad usually sets up the bicycle in front of the door for me.
